title: The Depths of Impel Down: Key Exchange
description: In the Impel Down storyline, this section centers on Ivankov, Unknown person #7, Magellan, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #20 as the scene develops across pages 10–13.
scene: This scene advances the Impel Down conflict through Ivankov, Unknown person #7, Magellan, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, focusing on the immediate stakes of the depths of impel down: key exchange.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: ACE IS GOING TO BE EXECUTED!!!

dialogue.speaker: Ivankov
dialogue.text: It's pointing straight up, isn't it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He's probably being transferred to the Marines.

dialogue.speaker: Ivankov
dialogue.text: If you want to escape here

dialogue.speaker: Ivankov
dialogue.text: What do you say, Strawhat...? Kuhahaha...

dialogue.speaker: Ivankov
dialogue.text: So this is where you were!!!
